pages.title: Maze Runner 3D Cards Hunt 2018
pages.description:
Navigate twisting corridors to collect scattered cards while avoiding obstacles in this 3D maze environment. • 3D maze navigation mechanics  
• Card collection challenge system  
• Responsive directional controls  
• Progressive level unlocking  
• Indoor puzzle environment design
